description_long: This security guard is dressed in a full-body pink jumpsuit with a hood that completely covers the head, leaving only a black face mask visible. The mask features a prominent white triangle symbol at the center, giving the figure a distinctive and somewhat intimidating appearance. The uniform is accessorized with a black utility belt, which holds two pouches or holsters on either side of the hips. Black gloves and black boots complete the outfit, and there are black patches on the upper arms. The overall look is highly standardized, with no visible skin or personal variation, suggesting a uniformed, anonymous role.
description: A security guard in a pink hooded jumpsuit with a black face mask marked by a white triangle, black gloves, boots, and a utility belt with pouches.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full pink jumpsuit, black gloves and boots, utility belt with pouches, and the black face mask with a white triangle.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hood, the black arm patch, and the side holster on the utility belt.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hood, the belt, and the overall fit of the jumpsuit, with both arm patches visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the black arm patch, side holster, and the contour of the uniform.
attribute_uniform_type: A standardized, full-body pink jumpsuit with a hood, black gloves, black boots, and a black face mask featuring a white triangle symbol; the uniform includes a black utility belt with pouches and black arm patches, presenting a formal and anonymous appearance.
attribute_security_insignia: black patch on upper left sleeve
black patch on upper right sleeve
white triangle symbol on face mask
attribute_posture: Standing upright with legs slightly apart and arms extended downward and outward in a neutral, alert stance.
